behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names columns.ts, textEllipsis utility, and explicitly lists the required CSS properties (minWidth: 0 in &-content, maxWidth positive in &-item, textEllipsis in &-content).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required CSS properties/locations but doesn't dictate exact line edits; the agent must determine how to restructure the style object.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept any positive maxWidth value (400, 300, '100%') and check structural placement of textEllipsis/minWidth rather than exact gold values.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests attempt to execute the style function via tsx (_execute_style_code) and fall back to source parsing; behavior-based inspection is attempted.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub wouldn't produce both minWidth:0 in &-content and maxWidth in &-item with textEllipsis moved - each requires specific changes.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all three required CSS changes mentioned in instruction.md.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named by behavior (test_text_ellipsis_moved_to_content, test_content_has_minWidth_zero, etc.) with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces CSS-in-JS code, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and names are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file (columns.ts) which is appropriate scope, and describes property requirements without giving exact line edits.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
